title: Qorus-Infosys Finacle Banking Innovation Awards 2025 Winners Announced
detailed_summary: Infosys Finacle and Qorus announced winners of the 12th Qorus-Infosys Finacle Banking Innovation Awards in Athens on December 03, 2025. The 2025 edition recognized 30 financial institutions across nine categories, based on 320 project submissions from 130 financial institutions across 53 countries. The document is primarily an awards announcement and does not disclose material financial or operating information for Infosys.
